tweets.full_text: @marryevan999 Anthropic

Someone needs to study how Anthropic can ship so fast AND run experiments at the same time.

They just created Project Deal, which has Claude negotiating real deals between employees.

> Built a Craigslist-style marketplace inside their SF office 69 employees brought in personal items (snowboards, bikes, electronics, ping-pong balls)

> Each got a $100 budget, and then handed everything to Claude.

> The agents posted listings. made offers. countered. walked away from bad deals. 

> Came back with better ones and closed transactions. all through Slack, zero human intervention.

> 186 deals closed. $4,000+ in total value. 500+ items listed.

> They ran 4 parallel markets. two used only Opus (the expensive model). two mixed Opus with Haiku (the cheap model).

Opus crushed it. Sellers using Opus got $3.64 more per deal on average and buyers paid $2.45 less. Across the board, the stronger model extracted better outcomes.

There's a few conclusions from this:

a) Companies need to be tokenmaxxing with the strongest models. If you're not using the most state-of-the-art models you'll lose to those who do

b) Companies which figure out agent quality through evals and building the right measurement loops will get much more out of their AI

c) Agent-native marketplaces will unlock a new efficient marketplaces in many verticals cc @tkexpress11's "Come for the Agent, Stay for the Network" post

user.name: Proflex Finance
user.description:
Hedge fund-style options & macro strategies for HNW investors
Investment Advisor (CRD #334262)

tweets.full_text:
Is this an AI bubble?

Bull Case: AI is structural transformation like railroads and internet. Enterprise adoption is measurable. Morgan Stanley cites margin expansion at adopters. Anthropic proves disciplined AI businesses can scale.

Bear Case: OpenAI at $852B with $14B in projected losses. $600B+ datacenter commitments with no proven return. Circular financing. DeepSeek proves premium pricing may not hold. Profitability timelines keep pushing out.

Honest take: both sides have merit. The tech is real. The adoption is real. But valuations are pricing in a future that hasn't arrived. The next 12 months, specifically whether OpenAI and Anthropic can show sustainable unit economics, will settle this.

user.name: Proflex Finance
user.description:
Hedge fund-style options & macro strategies for HNW investors
Investment Advisor (CRD #334262)

tweets.full_text:
If OpenAI is struggling, why are investors still bullish on AI?

Anthropic.

$1B revenue (early 2025) → $30B+ (April 2026). 30x in 14 months. No precedent in enterprise software.

80% enterprise-driven. 8 of Fortune 10 are customers. Claude Code is embedded in developer workflows. Salesforce, Notion, Slack integrations make it sticky.

IPO targeting October 2026. Goldman and JPMorgan as underwriters. $400B to $500B valuation. Secondary markets already imply ~$1 trillion.

Where OpenAI is split between consumer and enterprise, Anthropic made one bet: enterprise-first, safety-branded, workflow-embedded. That clarity is winning.

tweets.full_text:
【速報】GoogleがAnthropicに最大400億ドルを投資——AI覇権争いが新局面へ

━ 何が起きたか ━
2026年4月24日、GoogleがAI企業Anthropicに最大400億ドル（約6兆円）を投資すると発表。まず100億ドルを即時拠出し、残り300億ドルは業績目標達成を条件に追加。Anthropicの企業価値は3,500億ドルに設定された。

━ なぜ重要なのか ━
・Microsoft-OpenAI連合に対抗する「Google-Anthropic連合」が事実上確立
・AI企業への単一投資としてMicrosoft以外では過去最大規模
・GoogleはTPU 5ギガワット分のコンピューティングを5年間提供することも合意

━ 何が変わるか ━
① AIインフラ整備が加速し、モデル開発競争がさらに激化
② AnthropicはClaude Codeなど開発者向け製品の拡充が可能に
③ OpenAIは大手クラウドとの独占的関係を失い、孤立リスクが浮上

━ 今後の注目点 ━
AmazonもAnthropicへ最大200億ドルの追加投資オプションを保有。3社によるAI投資競争は今後さらに激化する見通し。

AI業界の構図が急速に塗り替わっている。競争の行方を注視したい。

詳細→ https://t.co/hdEcjKa26P

tweets.full_text:
Space X、Open AIそしてAnthropic が今年上場する。
このIPOで、大量の資金が🇺🇸アメリカ人からAI軍需産業に吸収される。（富国強兵のような国策かもしれない）

またAI軍需産業によって衰退したソフトウェア産業に投資してきた私募債が日増しに価値を失っている。これに投資してきた大手の生命保険会社や🇺🇸公務員むけ年金基金や富裕層がその結果大損する。AIインフルエンサーはここぞとばかりに私募債を叩いてIPOを盛り上げている（これも国策かもしれない）

今年11月に中間選挙が終わる。その後しばらくはアメリカ株式市場はいつも絶好調という統計がある。

だがそのあとは大変な『宴のあと』になると思う。

ドル安傾向もある。
🇺🇸資金流出（キャピタルフライト✈️）傾向とも、なんだか言えるのかもしれない

AI企業のAnthropicが、ここ最近のLLM業界で急速に存在感を増している。コーディング支援ツール「Claude Code」を軸に、エンジニア層を捉えることで一気にシェアを伸ばしてきたプレイヤーである。

同社はもともとOpenAIの元メンバーが立ち上げた会社で、世界中の古本をOCRで取り込みLLMの学習に投じるなど攻めた手法で成長。GPUの計算リソース確保にも巨額の資金を集め、矢継ぎ早にサービスを投入している状況だ。

user.name: Shikhar
user.description: I talk about tech and AI • Linux enthusiast

tweets.full_text:
The technology: Model Context Protocol (MCP).

Originally released by Anthropic in 2024, now housed under the Linux Foundation. Adopted by OpenAI, Google DeepMind, Microsoft.

This is the open standard that lets AI models interact with external systems. Including regulated trading accounts.

user.name: Marc Baumann 🌔
user.description: Founder @fiftyonexyz | Chief Growth Officer  @dfnshq | daily alpha on digital assets👉 📩 Join 35k+ & get the alpha https://join.fiftyone.xyz

tweets.full_text:
Microsoft just put AI agents on the Windows taskbar.

Not Copilot chat. Not a sidebar assistant. Actual agents that live in your taskbar, powered by Model Context Protocol.

Same MCP that runs my entire operations stack. Same protocol Anthropic open-sourced. Same one that crossed 97 million installs three weeks ago.

Now it's baked into the operating system.

Here's what most people are missing about this:

The protocol war is over. MCP won. And the distribution game just shifted from "which model is best" to "which protocol connects everything."

Microsoft isn't building the agents. They're building the harness. Third-party developers plug their agents into MCP, connect to the Windows taskbar through a new API, and users interact with them like any other app.

Sound familiar?

That's the same pattern playing out everywhere. The model is the horse. The harness is the product. The person who knows which horse to ride and where to aim it is the operator.

Every major platform is converging on the same architecture: give agents a persistent identity, connect them via MCP, let them act across your tools.

Google just did the same thing with Gemini Enterprise. Cryptographic agent IDs. Agent Registry. Agent Gateway. All built on MCP and A2A.

The companies still debating which chatbot to subscribe to are already two moves behind.

The ones building agent infrastructure into their daily operations are going to look obvious in hindsight.

What's the first agent you'd pin to your taskbar?

user.name: Ben Valentin
user.description: Hire Your First AI Employee

tweets.full_text: Anthropic confirmed the Model Context Protocol runs any process command on the host. The STDIO link from AI tools to your machine ships this way across roughly 200,000 instances. CVEs hit multiple products. The vendor says the remote code execution is the feature.

user.name: Can Artuc
user.description: Writing about the people and projects behind Linux and open source. 20+ years building software and data architectures. No hype, no tutorials. Newsletter below.

tweets.full_text:
A "by design" flaw in the Anthropic Model Context Protocol (MCP) allows attackers to weaponize normal AI workflows.

The core issue? The protocol... 

⚠️ Executes commands before validating if they are legitimate.
⚠️ Bypasses EDR and firewalls by hiding in uninspected east-west AI traffic.
⚠️ Weaponizes normal workflows to quietly exfiltrate sensitive data.

Stop relying on signature-based rules. Learn the how you can better secure your agentic future: https://t.co/aU4lQhSXol

tweets.full_text: MCP stands for Model Context Protocol, created by Anthropic in 2024. Think of it as USB for AI: a universal connection standard so any compatible AI tool can talk to your WordPress site the same way. No custom integrations needed.

tweets.full_text:
7/ La pregunta que nadie hace: ¿en qué se diferencia esto de cualquier MCP server?
La respuesta importa. Si los conectores son solo wrappers de MCP, el diferencial es la distribución, no la tecnología.
Si son más que eso, Anthropic tiene algo real.

TOP 10 RESOURCES TO MASTER MCP & AUTONOMOUS VOICE AGENTS:

​1) INTRODUCING THE MODEL CONTEXT PROTOCOL - ANTHROPIC

https://t.co/9gyySWrJ9O

​2) MODEL CONTEXT PROTOCOL GITHUB REPOSITORY

https://t.co/HRKmb3LW4p https://t.co/hxxwvs42Zu

Flowise の深刻な脆弱性：Anthropic MCP アダプタ経由でのコマンド実行の恐れ
https://t.co/MUWHfgyVM5
今回の問題は、AI エージェント同士を繋ぐ標準規格である MCP (Model Context Protocol) の設計そのものに原因があります。一般的なプログラムの書き間違いではなく、SDK の作り方という深層にリスクが潜んでいるため、開発者が気づかないうちに脆弱性を引き継いでしまう点が非常に特殊です。この設計上の判断により、本来は安全なはずの環境でも、攻撃者にコマンド実行を許す恐れがあります。現時点において、LiteLLM／LangChain／Flowise などのフレームワークに影響が及んでおり、すでに 10 件以上の CVE が発行されています。ご利用のチームは、ご注意ください。
#Anthropic #Flowise #MCP #Vulnerability
